description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing angelic figure with large, detailed wings extending from its back. The figure is draped in flowing robes, with intricate folds and textures that suggest a classical or neoclassical style. The angel holds an object, possibly a scroll or staff, in both hands at the front of its body. The facial features are serene and idealized, with long, wavy hair cascading down to the shoulders. The wings are feathered and symmetrical, adding to the sense of grace and solemnity. The sculpture stands on a rectangular plinth, giving it a stable and formal presentation.
description: A detailed angelic figure in flowing robes with large feathered wings, holding an object and standing on a rectangular plinth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angel's face, both wings, and the object held in front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the drapery of the robes, and the depth of the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the wings and the back of the robes and head.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile and the way the wings and robes fall along the body.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
